headline: IT stocks power Nifty, Sensex higher; Bank Nifty underperforms as financials drag
gist: Nifty +0.22% to 24,132.6, Sensex +0.35% to 77,457 on IT-led gains (HCL Tech, Tech Mahindra); Bank Nifty -0.27%, Axis Bank among laggards

headline: RBI approves Rajiv Kumar as HDFC Bank part-time Chairman for 3-year term
gist: RBI approval effective July 15, removes governance overhang for HDFC Bank

headline: Bank Nifty underperforming broader market, down 0.27%
gist: Axis Bank among session's biggest laggards, index trading near day lows below VWAP

headline: US natural gas slides to 2-month low
gist: NG=F -1.37% to $2.88, pressured by Freeport LNG maintenance trapping supply and cooler weather cutting cooling demand

headline: Gold retreats from highs on hawkish Fed bets, firm dollar
gist: GC=F -0.43% to $4,034.40, faded off day high $4,071.90 ahead of Philly Fed index and jobless claims data; silver tracked lower

headline: US strikes pound Iran for 5th day; tanker disabled with Hellfire strike near Kharg Island
gist: WTI $79.47 (-0.16%), Brent ~$84.8; Hormuz shipping near standstill despite prior US-Iran MoU, naval blockade in effect

headline: HDFC Life Q1: new business premium +12% YoY, VNB +9% but margins slip
gist: NBP Rs8,143cr (+12% YoY), APE +9% to Rs3,515cr, VNB +9% to Rs879cr, new-business margins fell
